sourcePrompt: A Burmese python at rest, a thick-bodied constrictor some four meters long gathered into a low mound of overlapping coils about a meter across. The body is as thick as a man's leg at the middle, the head resting on the top coil with a flicked forked tongue. Tan and gold scales patterned with big dark-brown blotches edged in black. Heavy, settled and still.
